text:
(INNPP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy within 
a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount rather than a co-payment amount will not have a 
value in this field; reference instead the corresponding coinsurance variable called 
(PRE_ICL_INNPP_COINS_1M). 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks.
